privacy.title: Polysee Privacy
privacy.intro: Ta'n Polycys Privacy shoh mharkey myr ta DevFolio coardail, ymmyd, as coadey dty fys pearsanta tra t'ou uss uss ar seirbaghyn.
privacy.section1Content: Ta shin jannoo coardail rish fys ta shiu cur stiagh dy jeeragh tra ta shiu jannoo cuntait, jannoo portfolio, as jannoo cowraghyn rish nyn cooney.
privacy.section2Content: Ta dty fys ry-chlashtyn son obbraghey, ymmyd, as cur stiagh ymmyd jeh ny seirbaghyn ain, as myrgeddin son co-chowraghey rhyt mychione dty account ny dty seirbaghyn.
privacy.section3Content: Ta shin cur stiagh aghtyn shleiy resonable dy choadey dty fys veih ymmyd, ymmyd, ny sniessey gyn aght.

verifyEmail.title: Check dty E-mail
verifyEmail.description: Ta shin er chur e-mail ymmyrchagh gys dty seihll e-mail. Fosley yn e-mail as cliaghtey er y botoon <1>"Dearree Cuntagh"</1> dy ghleiyn dty chuntae.
verifyEmail.step1: Foshlit dty 'application' e-mail (Gmail, Yahoo, as myr shen)
verifyEmail.step2: Cur-my-ner email veih DevFolio lesh y theay "Cur-my-ner"
verifyEmail.step4: T'ou er ny stiurey gys y duillag login dy gholl stiagh
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Ta'n e-mail verify er ny choyrt reesht!
verifyEmail.footerNote: Nagh row yn e-mail er gheddyn? Shegin dhyt y <1>Spam</1> ny <2>Junk</2> y chowraghey ayns dty e-mail. Ta'n linney verify ry-gheddyn son <3>24 oor</3>.
